title: 3D Items
description: Items that are usually are rendered as icons, now render as a 3D model in you inventory and hotbar.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12b7d08cfd8af05e0c74bec87ff64272a9b5798c.png)

### Items that are normally visible as icons, now look 3D in you inventory & hotbar.
## Item list
- Torch
- Lantern
- Boat
- Bell
- Campfire
- Lever
- Door
- Hopper
- Cauldron
- Brew Stand
- Cake
- Minecart (with Chest)
- Turtle Eggs
- Sea Pickle
- Redstone Repeater

Items like the campfire are even animated!

You can also download this pack on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/items3d), if you prefer that! :)
